name: Public procurement through PRAZ-regulated channels
notes: Supported by the Black Book records: the eGP service and the tender portals are recorded as public-entity procurement channels. Detailed procurement rules and thresholds are deliberately not restated. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Public entities conduct procurement under the PRAZ-regulated framework, publishing opportunities through the national eGP and public tender portals.
appliesWhen: For procurement conducted by public entities; supplier-side registration is the counterpart obligation.

name: Employer (PAYE) obligations (ZIMRA)
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Public entities that employ staff register for PAYE, remit monthly and file the annual ITF 16 return.
appliesWhen: As employers; monthly remittance and annual return.

name: NSSA employer obligations
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers of labour; scheme applicability for specific public-service categories must be confirmed with NSSA. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Public entities employing labour register with NSSA and remit POBS contributions monthly.
appliesWhen: As employers of labour; monthly remittance.

name: Local government portfolio oversight (context)
notes: Recorded as portfolio context from the Parliament ministers list. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: The Ministry of Local Government and Public Works holds the local-government portfolio under which councils are administered.

name: Public financial management obligations
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Budgeting, reporting and treasury obligations under the public financial-management framework are not yet evidenced by Black Book records; nothing is asserted.

name: Auditor-General audit obligations
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Annual audit obligations of public entities by the Office of the Auditor-General are not yet evidenced by Black Book records (the office itself is not yet a directory entry).

name: Public entity corporate governance obligations
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Corporate-governance obligations for public entities (board, remuneration and reporting rules) are not yet evidenced by Black Book records.
